Header.searchPlaceholder: Reserved for search and group-buy discovery. You can turn this into search, hot keywords, or category filters later.
Header.workspaceSummary: Create group buys, manage campaigns, handle payments, and close orders
Header.myHomeNote: View leader profile and active group buys

nav.myJoinedGroupBuysNote: View joined records and activity links

sidebar.title: Set up products and variants first
sidebar.description: Organize the title, media, products, and SKU rules first so fulfillment stays tidy later.

status.title: Pre-publish check
status.description: Complete intro, settings, products, and pricing rules in order. Key status stays pinned on the left.

intro.title: Intro
intro.localPreview: Local files will generate previews first.

groupRules.title: Group Rules
groupRules.action: Control participant thresholds and success rules

settings.title: Group Buy Settings
settings.action: Configure fulfillment, timing, and notifications here
settings.logisticsDescription: Enable shipping, local delivery, or self pickup
settings.logisticsHint: Default fulfillment appears first on the order page
settings.shipmentDescription: Can be left empty and handled later in the management page
settings.groupTimeDescription: Participants can no longer join after the end time
settings.notifyDescription: Choose who receives a notification after publishing
settings.moreSettingsDescription: Coupon, affiliate sale, and privacy settings

products.title: Group Buy Products
products.description: Recommended within {softLimit} products, maximum {hardLimit}. When there are many products, the left list stays pinned and the right side edits the selected product.
products.productListHelp: Click a product on the left to edit it
products.libraryDescription: Search product names or variants. After importing, you can still edit images, prices, and variants.

productEditor.detailsHelp: Name, category, and images decide what users see first.
productEditor.name: Product name
productEditor.categoryTip: Choose an existing category for product library management, filtering, and group-buy display.
productEditor.priceTip: Base group-buy price. Each SKU can have its own price after variants are enabled.
productEditor.costPriceTip: Only used by the leader to estimate profit. It is not shown to buyers.

productImages.label: Product images
productImages.empty: Add a product image. The first image will be used as the cover.
productImages.trimmed: Only {count} more can be added, so the first {count} files were used

variants.title: Variants
variants.description: Variant types are customizable. SKUs are generated from all variant combinations.
variants.noVariants: This product has no variants. Changes will apply to the default variant.

commonSpecs.title: Manage common variants
commonSpecs.description: Maintain quick variant presets. Existing variants already added to the current product will not be changed automatically.

logisticsDialog.title: Fulfillment method
logisticsDialog.description: Choose one fulfillment method for this group buy, then configure delivery and freight.
logisticsDialog.deliveryNotePlaceholder: Example: Deliver to the dorm lobby
logisticsDialog.receiverInfoTip: Do not collect personal information beyond what is needed.

priceRules.title: Pricing Rules
priceRules.action: Used to match the activity price during checkout

defaults.title: Weekend dessert group buy
defaults.introText: Preorder group. Delivery starts after the seller receives the items. Please watch messages and pick up promptly after delivery.
defaults.deliveryNote: Deliver to the pickup point downstairs
defaults.deliveryRemark: When there are multiple orders in the same building, notify by building.

sampleProduct.name: Dual Dessert Combo
sampleProduct.description: Choose from sticky rice, taro paste, and custom cheese flavors.

tips.bulkPrice: Sales price applied to selected variants.
tips.bulkCostPrice: Used for profit calculation only and not shown to buyers.
tips.bulkStock: Blank values do not overwrite current stock. Blank SKU stock is treated as unlimited.

almostFull.title: Almost Full
almostFull.description: High-converting groups that only need a few more people, with bundled products shown up front.
almostFull.badge: Only one more might complete it
